about: Report something that isn't working as expected

---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available
(`docker logs jobtracker-backend`, browser console, etc.).

## Environment

- Component: [ ] backend [ ] frontend [ ] deploy/CI [ ] AI assistant
- Run mode: [ ] local dev [ ] NAS / docker compose
- Backend build: [ ] slim [ ] WITH_SEMANTIC=true
- LLM provider (if relevant): Anthropic / Gemini / OpenAI / none

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, config (with secrets redacted), etc.
